## QA Testing Task

### Objective
<!-- What is the testing objective? -->

### Feature/Component
<!-- Which feature or component needs testing? -->

### Testing Type
- [ ] Unit Test Implementation
- [ ] Integration Test Implementation
- [ ] E2E Test Implementation
- [ ] Manual Test Plan
- [ ] Bug Investigation
- [ ] Test Coverage Gap
- [ ] Performance Testing
- [ ] Security Testing

1. **Happy Path**

   - [ ] Scenario:

3. **Error Handling**
   - [ ] Scenario:
   - Expected Outcome:

### Test Data Requirements
<!-- What test data or environment setup is needed? -->

### Tools & Framework
<!-- Which testing tools/frameworks to use? -->
- [ ] Jest
- [ ] Mocha
- [ ] Pytest
- [ ] JUnit
- [ ] Selenium
- [ ] Cypress
- [ ] Playwright
- [ ] Other: ___________

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests are written and passing
- [ ] Coverage meets target (>80% for critical)
- [ ] No flaky or non-deterministic tests
- [ ] Edge cases covered
- [ ] Error paths validated
- [ ] Test documentation complete
- [ ] CI/CD pipeline validates tests

### Related Issues/PRs
<!-- Link to related issues or pull requests -->

### Notes
<!-- Any additional notes or considerations -->

---

## For QA Engineer

### Testing Checklist
- [ ] Understand requirements and acceptance criteria
- [ ] Identify all test scenarios
- [ ] Set up test environment
- [ ] Prepare test data
- [ ] Create test cases
- [ ] Execute tests
- [ ] Document results
- [ ] Report findings

### Test Report
<!-- Include test execution results, findings, and metrics -->

### Issues Found
<!-- List any issues discovered during testing -->

### Coverage Analysis
<!-- Current coverage: X%
Target coverage: 80%
Gaps identified: [...]
-->

### Recommendations
<!-- Any recommendations for improving testing or quality -->
